Variables.Name: bAttenuate
Variables.Description: Allows distance-based volume attenuation.

Variables.Name: bSpatialize
Variables.Description: Allows the source to be 3D spatialized.

Variables.Name: bAttenuateWithLPF
Variables.Description: Allows simulation of air absorption by applying a filter with a cutoff frequency as a function of distance.

Variables.Name: bEnableListenerFocus
Variables.Description: Enable listener focus-based adjustments.

Variables.Name: bEnableFocusInterpolation
Variables.Description: Enables focus interpolation to smooth transition in and and of focus.

Variables.Name: bEnableOcclusion
Variables.Description: Enables realtime occlusion tracing.

Variables.Name: bUseComplexCollisionForOcclusion
Variables.Description: Enables tracing against complex collision when doing occlusion traces.

Variables.Name: bEnableReverbSend
Variables.Description: Enables adjusting reverb sends based on distance.

Variables.Name: bApplyNormalizationToStereoSounds
Variables.Description: Enables applying a -6 dB attenuation to stereo assets which are 3d spatialized. Avoids clipping when assets have spread of 0.0 due to channel summing.

Variables.Name: bEnableLogFrequencyScaling
Variables.Description: Enables applying a log scale to frequency values (so frequency sweeping is perceptually linear).

Variables.Name: OmniRadius
Variables.Description: The distance below which a sound is non-spatialized (2D). This prevents near-field audio from flipping as audio crosses the listener's position.

Variables.Name: StereoSpread
Variables.Description: The world-space absolution distance between left and right stereo channels when stereo assets are 3D spatialized.

Variables.Name: SpatializationAlgorithm
Variables.Description: What method we use to spatialize the sound.

Variables.Name: SpatializationPluginSettings
Variables.Description: Settings to use with occlusion audio plugin. These are defined by the plugin creator. Not all audio plugins utilize this feature.

Variables.Name: LPFRadiusMin
Variables.Description: The distance min range at which to apply an absorption LPF filter.

Variables.Name: LPFRadiusMax
Variables.Description: The max distance range at which to apply an absorption LPF filter. Absorption freq cutoff interpolates between filter frequency ranges between these distance values.

Variables.Name: AbsorptionMethod
Variables.Description: What method to use to map distance values to frequency absorption values.

Variables.Name: CustomLowpassAirAbsorptionCurve
Variables.Description: The normalized custom curve to use for the air absorption lowpass frequency values. Does a mapping from defined distance values (x-axis) and defined frequency values (y-axis)

Variables.Name: CustomHighpassAirAbsorptionCurve
Variables.Description: The normalized custom curve to use for the air absorption highpass frequency values. Does a mapping from defined distance values (x-axis) and defined frequency values (y-axis)

Variables.Name: LPFFrequencyAtMin
Variables.Description: The range of the cutoff frequency (in hz) of the lowpass absorption filter.

Variables.Name: LPFFrequencyAtMax
Variables.Description: The range of the cutoff frequency (in hz) of the lowpass absorption filter.

Variables.Name: HPFFrequencyAtMin
Variables.Description: The range of the cutoff frequency (in hz) of the highpass absorption filter.

Variables.Name: HPFFrequencyAtMax
Variables.Description: The range of the cutoff frequency (in hz) of the highpass absorption filter.

Variables.Name: FocusAzimuth
Variables.Description: Azimuth angle (in degrees) relative to the listener forward vector which defines the focus region of sounds. Sounds playing at an angle less than this will be in focus.

Variables.Name: NonFocusAzimuth
Variables.Description: Azimuth angle (in degrees) relative to the listener forward vector which defines the non-focus region of sounds. Sounds playing at an angle greater than this will be out of focus.

Variables.Name: FocusDistanceScale
Variables.Description: Amount to scale the distance calculation of sounds that are in-focus. Can be used to make in-focus sounds appear to be closer or further away than they actually are.

Variables.Name: NonFocusDistanceScale
Variables.Description: Amount to scale the distance calculation of sounds that are not in-focus. Can be used to make in-focus sounds appear to be closer or further away than they actually are.

Variables.Name: FocusPriorityScale
Variables.Description: Amount to scale the priority of sounds that are in focus. Can be used to boost the priority of sounds that are in focus.

Variables.Name: NonFocusPriorityScale
Variables.Description: Amount to scale the priority of sounds that are not in-focus. Can be used to reduce the priority of sounds that are not in focus.

Variables.Name: FocusVolumeAttenuation
Variables.Description: Amount to attenuate sounds that are in focus. Can be overridden at the sound-level.

Variables.Name: NonFocusVolumeAttenuation
Variables.Description: Amount to attenuate sounds that are not in focus. Can be overridden at the sound-level.

Variables.Name: FocusAttackInterpSpeed
Variables.Description: Scalar used to increase interpolation speed upwards to the target Focus value

Variables.Name: FocusReleaseInterpSpeed
Variables.Description: Scalar used to increase interpolation speed downwards to the target Focus value

Variables.Name: OcclusionTraceChannel
Variables.Description: Which trace channel to use for audio occlusion checks.

Variables.Name: OcclusionLowPassFilterFrequency
Variables.Description: The low pass filter frequency (in hertz) to apply if the sound playing in this audio component is occluded. This will override the frequency set in LowPassFilterFrequency. A frequency of 0.0 is the device sample rate and will bypass the filter.

Variables.Name: OcclusionVolumeAttenuation
Variables.Description: The amount of volume attenuation to apply to sounds which are occluded.

Variables.Name: OcclusionInterpolationTime
Variables.Description: The amount of time in seconds to interpolate to the target OcclusionLowPassFilterFrequency when a sound is occluded.

Variables.Name: OcclusionPluginSettings
Variables.Description: Settings to use with occlusion audio plugin. These are defined by the plugin creator. Not all audio plugins utilize this feature.

Variables.Name: ReverbSendMethod
Variables.Description: What method to use to control master reverb sends

Variables.Name: ReverbPluginSettings
Variables.Description: Settings to use with reverb audio plugin. These are defined by the plugin creator. Not all audio plugins utilize this feature.

Variables.Name: ReverbWetLevelMin
Variables.Description: The amount to send to master reverb when sound is located at a distance equal to value specified in the reverb min send distance.

Variables.Name: ReverbWetLevelMax
Variables.Description: The amount to send to master reverb when sound is located at a distance equal to value specified in the reverb max send distance.

Variables.Name: ReverbDistanceMin
Variables.Description: The min distance to send to the master reverb.

Variables.Name: ReverbDistanceMax
Variables.Description: The max distance to send to the master reverb.

Variables.Name: CustomReverbSendCurve
Variables.Description: The custom reverb send curve to use for distance-based send level.

Variables.Name: ManualReverbSendLevel
Variables.Description: The manual master reverb send level to use. Doesn't change as a function of distance.
